layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Use grid-cols-2 on mobile for telemetry data, grid-cols-1 for lists. Dense and compact spacing.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D63026] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,59,48,0.39)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#262626] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] border border-white/10 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-[#CCFF00] border-2 border-[#CCFF00] hover:bg-[#CCFF00]/10 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold uppercase transition-all

components.inputs: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] rounded-lg

data_display.metric_card: flex flex-col items-start p-4 bg-[#171717] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl
data_display.metric_label: font-body text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#A3A3A3] mb-1

icons.style: Stroke width 2px, sharp and clinical. Use Phosphor Icons if heavier weights are needed.

login_hero.description: Man in helmet sitting on motorcycle near columns at night. Use as a full-screen background for Login/Register with a heavy bg-black/70 overlay to ensure text contrast.

helmet_pairing.description: A black and white photo of a motorcycle helmet. Use in the 'Bluetooth Device Connection' screen as the visual anchor when scanning for the helmet.

dashboard_header.description: Black and silver motorcycle in the city during night time. Use as a subtle, low-opacity (bg-black/80) header background in the Settings or User Profile screen.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. Use text-white on #0A0A0A. Avoid pure black backgrounds for text-heavy areas, use #171717 to reduce OLED smear.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='connect-helmet-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors. Do not use generic Shadcn slate/gray.
For the real-time telemetry dashboard, use a 2-column bento grid for metrics (Speed, G-Force X, Y, Z).
Implement the impact classification visually: Low <5G (Green #34C759), Medium 5-10G (Yellow #FF9500), High 10-15G (Orange), Critical >15G (Red #FF3B30 with pulse animation).
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all numeric data readouts to give a technical, 'Control Room' gauge feel.
Ensure all interactive components have proper focus states using focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF].
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for the dashboard layout, heavily customizing Shadcn components to fit the 'Tactical Neumorphism' style.
Install and use lucide-react for iconography. Keep icons clean and un-filled unless representing an active state.
